description: Generate the properly formatted function call structure with extracted coefficients

inputs.name: coefficients
inputs.description: Dictionary containing the extracted coefficients a, b, c as integers from the quadratic equation

output.description: Returns function call format: [{'solve_quadratic_equation': {'a': [2], 'b': [6], 'c': [5]}}] where coefficients are wrapped in arrays as shown in the expected output structure

workflow_spec.name: Parse Quadratic Equation and Generate Function Call
workflow_spec.description: Parses a quadratic equation query to extract coefficients and generates the appropriate function call with parameters
